Objects.Name: [Module] Power-up Switch
Objects.Notes: A controller that activates a switch if a certain power-up condition is met.

Classes.Name: MorphSwitchCtrl
Classes.Notes: A controller that activates a switch if a certain power-up condition is met. Yoshi and his power-ups can also be checked.

Obj_arg0.Name: Power-up Type
Obj_arg0.Description: The item counter that will be checked. Default is 0.

Values.Notes: Boo Mushroom (Obj_arg2 checks if player is invisible)
Spin Drill (Obj_arg2 checks if player is drilling)
Red Star (Obj_arg2 checks if player is flying)
Rock Mushroom (Obj_arg2 checks if player is rolling)

Obj_arg1.Name: Deactivate if Lost?
Obj_arg1.Description: If set, SW_A will be deactivated when the condition is no longer met.

Obj_arg2.Name: Extra Condition?
Obj_arg2.Description: If set, an additional condition is needed in order for the switch to activate. The condition depends on the chosen power-up.
